MpDaVinciBot

Header default Landing Chat thread Generating Composer History overlay History rail History empty Headerless

Draft & preview

Draft card default Draft added Draft selected With / without rationale Preview KPI Preview bar Preview line Preview area Preview donut Preview table Preview activity

Severities With action

Toast

Toast variants

Modals

Refine dialog Expand dialog

Page

DaVinciCopilot layout

Da Vinci designer Storybook

Static reference for external design review. Mirrors Maropost playground tokens and copilot Vue components. Toggle theme to compare light and dark surfaces.

Foundations aiAccent.* — accessible calm SaaS blue

Source: tokens.json → color.light.aiAccent. Aliases: --dv-* in app via src/styles/dv-tokens.css.

primary
5.0:1 on white
hover
active
gradient
soft
border
textPrimary
textSecondary
5.1:1
muted
metric +
metric −

Header chrome uses --dv-header-grad (soft → muted). Avatars, send, New chat, Draft badge use --dv-grad with --dv-on-accent foreground.

FoundationsSpacing scale (4px base)

Auto-layout: use gap 12 between list items, padding 16/14/12/14 on DvDraftCard frames.

FoundationsBorder radius
Foundations Typography scale

Eyebrow, panel title, landing title, body, composer.

Eyebrow · 11px semi 600 +1.5px ls
Panel title — 15px / 600
Landing title — 20px / 700
Body / bot intro — 14px / 500
Caption — 12px muted
Foundations Iconography (inline SVG)

App uses Lucide via Vuetify; this file uses minimal SVG stand-ins for size reference.

40px avatar · 14–16px icon
MpDaVinciBot Header — light & dark

Right column uses dark theme variables (preview only; use toggle for global dark).

Da Vinci
Intelligent AI assistant
Da Vinci
Intelligent AI assistant

Dark header gradient (isolated preview box).

What can I help you build?

Ask Da Vinci for a metric, trend, comparison, or table.

MpDaVinciBot Chat — user bubble, bot intro, rationale, draft meta
Show revenue by channel for last 30 days
Here are 3 widgets I drafted for Marketing overview.
Why theseYou asked about revenue · last 30 days. I pulled from commerce orders, then drafted a KPI summary and a channel breakdown.

Preview · expanded density
Figma Layer naming & auto-layout 
DvDraftCard
├─ Frame / Card          padding: 0 · gap: 0 · radius: 12
│  ├─ Header / TypeRow   padding: 12/14/0 · gap: 10
│  │  ├─ Eyebrow
│  │  ├─ TypeIcon
│  │  └─ Badge / Draft
│  ├─ Body / TitleBlock  padding: 8/14/12
│  ├─ Preview / DvDraftPreview  padding: 0/14/14
│  └─ Footer / Actions   padding: 10/12 · gap: 6 · height: 32
DvComposer
├─ Frame / Composer      padding: 16 · gap: 10
│  ├─ PillsRow           gap: 6
│  └─ InputRow           padding: 6/8/6/12 · gap: 6 · radius: 12
│     ├─ AttachIcon
│     ├─ TextField
│     └─ SendButton      32×32 · radius: full
FigmaLive token values
AccessibilityWCAG AA verification
SurfaceForegroundRatioWCAG
Primary button (--dv-accent)--dv-on-accent5.0:1AA normal
Draft badge gradient--dv-on-accent5.0:1+AA normal
User bubble--dv-on-accent5.0:1AA normal
Helper text--dv-text-secondary on white5.1:1AA normal
Why-these card--dv-text-primary on --dv-accent-soft9.4:1AAA
Input placeholder--dv-text-secondary5.1:1AA
Icon-only actionsFocus ring --dv-accent @ 40%3:1 UIAA UI
Toast invertedTheme inversion7:1+AAA
Component states DvDraftCard · DvSuggestionChip · DvComposer · DvIconButton · DvBadge · DvMetricTile · DvToast
